document_api_meta.title: Create Goods

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

request_body_param.name: ^tts_sku_id
request_body_param.desc: Identifier for Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) generated by TikTok Shop system

request_body_param.name: ^return_handling_method
request_body_param.desc:
The return handling method applied when enabling the FBT customer return service, the default value will be Restock sellable, Dispose unsellable
Possible values:
-Dispose_of_all_returned_units
-Restock_sellable_dispose_of_unsellable

request_body_param.name: ^^weight_unit
request_body_param.desc: Weight unit.Possible values:- MILLIGRAM - GRAM- KILOGRAM - POUND - OUNCE

request_body_param.name: ^^dimension_unit
request_body_param.desc:
Dimension unit. 
Possible values:
- MILLIMETER 
- CENTIMETER
- METER 
- FOOT 
- INCH

request_body_param.name: ^^^battery_type
request_body_param.desc:
Battery type
Possible values:
LITHIUM_ION
LITHIUM_METAL
OTHER

request_body_param.name: ^^^is_need_un_38_3_test
request_body_param.desc: UN38.3 testing ensures that batteries meet specific safety criteria. Please send the report in the field if it's not included in the MSDS.

request_body_param.name: ^^^flammable_liquids_type
request_body_param.desc:
Flammable liquid type, possible values
-Paints
-Perfumery products
-Alcohols
-Other

request_body_param.name: ^^dg_uncode
request_body_param.desc:
UN number or UN ID is a 4-digit number that identifies hazardous substances
possible values
-UN2807
-UN3480
-UN3090
-UN3481
-UN3091
-UN1263
-UN1266
-UN3065
-OTHER

request_body_param.name: ^^msds_file_url
request_body_param.desc: Material safety data sheet of the hazmat goods to support review the goods' safety compliance in FBT

request_body_param.name: ^^inbound_cutoff_days
request_body_param.desc: The goods inbound cutoff days before expiration, represent the time period before the product's expiration when the warehouse will no longer accept inbound shipments.

request_body_param.name: ^^expiration_alert_days
request_body_param.desc: The goods alert days before expired, represent the period of time before platform send expiration reminder alerts to the merchant.

request_body_param.name: ^^sales_cutoff_days
request_body_param.desc: The goods sales cut off days before expired, represent the period of time before expiration in which the goods will no longer be available for sale.

request_body_param.name: ^^handling_method_expired_goods
request_body_param.desc:
The handling method for expired inventory. 
Possible values:
STORE_UNITS
RETURN_TO_SELLER
DISPOSE

request_body_param.name: ^^return_cycle
request_body_param.desc:
The return cycle applied when the handling method is set to RETURN_TO_SUPPLIER. In this case, the automatic creation of exit inventory orders will follow one of return cycle rules.
Possible values:
- ONCE_A_WEEK
- ONCE_A_MONTH
- ONCE_A_QUARTER

request_body_param.name: ^^^name
request_body_param.desc: The name of the contact person.

request_body_param.name: ^^^phone_number
request_body_param.desc: The phone number of the contact person.

request_body_param.name: ^^^postal_code
request_body_param.desc: postal code (also known as zip code).

request_body_param.name: ^^^region_code
request_body_param.desc: region code in two-character ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

request_body_param.name: ^^^address_line2
request_body_param.desc: The detail address line 2, additional address information(optional).

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^^tts_sku_id
response_param.desc: The detail address line 2, additional address information(optional).

response_param.name: ^^^tts_goods_id
response_param.desc: Identifier for goods generated by Fulfilled by TikTok system

response_param.name: ^^^fail_reason
response_param.desc: Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

document_api_meta.request_body: {"create_goods_dto_list":[{"tts_sku_id":"723456789012345678","create_goods_type":"CREATE_AND_BIND","goods_name":"ABC","goods_image_url":"https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333","reference_code":"ABDK999d","barcode_infos":[{"barcode_type":"UPC","barcode_value":"698888200121"}],"return_handling_method":"COLLECT_RETURN_UNITS","dimension_and_weight_base_info":{"weight_value":"1","length_value":"2","width_value":"2","height_value":"3","weight_unit":"GRAM","dimension_unit":"CENTIMETER"},"is_hazmat":false,"hazmat_info":{"hazmat_type":"BATTERY","battery_extra_info":{"battery_type":"LITHIUM_ION","battery_packaging_type":"STANDALONE","total_battery_weight":"10","total_battery_weight_unit":"GRAM","total_battery_capacity":"2","total_battery_capacity_unit":"WATTHOUR","is_need_un_38_3_test":false,"un_38_3_test_file_url":"https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333","battery_count_per_package":"3"},"flammable_liquids_extra_info":{"flammable_liquids_type":"PAINT","flammable_liquids_volume":"1","volume_unit":"MILLILITERS"},"dg_class":"ClASS_2","dg_uncode":"UN3480","msds_file_url":"https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333"},"is_lot_code":false,"is_expiration_management":false,"shelf_life_attribute_info":{"shelf_life":90,"inbound_cutoff_days":100,"expiration_alert_days":90,"sales_cutoff_days":80,"handling_method_expired_goods":"DISPOSE","return_cycle":"ONCE_A_WEEK","return_address_info":{"name":"abc","phone_number":"12221212121","postal_code":"92376","region_code":"US","state":"CA","district":"San Bernardino","city":"Rialto","address_line1":"1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino","address_line2":"1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino"}}}]}

sample_code.label: Curl
sample_code.value:
curl -X POST \
 'https://open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com/fbt/202603/goods/create_goods?app_key=38abcd&sign=5361235029d141222525e303d742f9e38aea052d10896d3197ab9d6233730b8c&timestamp=1623812664&shop_cipher=GCP_XF90igAAAABh00qsWgtvOiGFNqyubMt3' \
-H 'x-tts-access-token: TTP_pwSm2AAAAABmmtFz1xlyKMnwg74T2GJ5s0uQbS8jPjb_GkdFVCxPqzQXSyuyfXdQa0AqyDsea2tYFNVf4XeqgZHFfPyv0Vs659QqyLYfsGzanZ5XZAin3_ZkcIxxS0_In6u6XDeU96k' \
-H 'content-type: application/json' \
-d '{
  "create_goods_dto_list": [
    {
      "tts_sku_id": "723456789012345678",
      "create_goods_type": "CREATE_AND_BIND",
      "goods_name": "ABC",
      "goods_image_url": "https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333",
      "reference_code": "ABDK999d",
      "barcode_infos": [
        {
          "barcode_type": "UPC",
          "barcode_value": "698888200121"
        }
      ],
      "return_handling_method": "COLLECT_RETURN_UNITS",
      "dimension_and_weight_base_info": {
        "weight_value": "1",
        "length_value": "2",
        "width_value": "2",
        "height_value": "3",
        "weight_unit": "GRAM",
        "dimension_unit": "CENTIMETER"
      },
      "is_hazmat": false,
      "hazmat_info": {
        "hazmat_type": "BATTERY",
        "battery_extra_info": {
          "battery_type": "LITHIUM_ION",
          "battery_packaging_type": "STANDALONE",
          "total_battery_weight": "10",
          "total_battery_weight_unit": "GRAM",
          "total_battery_capacity": "2",
          "total_battery_capacity_unit": "WATTHOUR",
          "is_need_un_38_3_test": false,
          "un_38_3_test_file_url": "https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333",
          "battery_count_per_package": "3"
        },
        "flammable_liquids_extra_info": {
          "flammable_liquids_type": "PAINT",
          "flammable_liquids_volume": "1",
          "volume_unit": "MILLILITERS"
        },
        "dg_class": "ClASS_2",
        "dg_uncode": "UN3480",
        "msds_file_url": "https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333"
      },
      "is_lot_code": false,
      "is_expiration_management": false,
      "shelf_life_attribute_info": {
        "shelf_life": 90,
        "inbound_cutoff_days": 100,
        "expiration_alert_days": 90,
        "sales_cutoff_days": 80,
        "handling_method_expired_goods": "DISPOSE",
        "return_cycle": "ONCE_A_WEEK",
        "return_address_info": {
          "name": "abc",
          "phone_number": "12221212121",
          "postal_code": "92376",
          "region_code": "US",
          "state": "CA",
          "district": "San Bernardino",
          "city": "Rialto",
          "address_line1": "1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino",
          "address_line2": "1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino"
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}'

sample_code.label: Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func fbt202603CreateGoodsPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.FbtV202603API.Fbt202603GoodsCreateGoodsPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.ShopCipher("your shop cipher")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBody := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBody()
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList()
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetTtsSkuId("723456789012345678")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetCreateGoodsType("CREATE_AND_BIND")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetGoodsName("ABC")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetGoodsImageUrl("https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962&fm=253&app=138&f=JPEG?w=800&h=1333")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetReferenceCode("ABDK999d")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListBarcodeInfos := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListBarcodeInfos()
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListBarcodeInfos.SetBarcodeType("UPC")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListBarcodeInfos.SetBarcodeValue("698888200121")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListBarcodeInfosList := []fbt_v202603.Fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListBarcodeInfos{*fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListBarcodeInfos}
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetBarcodeInfos(fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListBarcodeInfosList)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetReturnHandlingMethod("COLLECT_RETURN_UNITS")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo()
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetWeightValue("1")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetLengthValue("2")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetWidthValue("2")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetHeightValue("3")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetWeightUnit("GRAM")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetDimensionUnit("CENTIMETER")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo(*fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetIsHazmat(false)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfo()
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfo.SetHazmatType("BATTERY")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo()
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetBatteryType("LITHIUM_ION")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetBatteryPackagingType("STANDALONE")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetTotalBatteryWeight("10")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetTotalBatteryWeightUnit("GRAM")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetTotalBatteryCapacity("2")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetTotalBatteryCapacityUnit("WATTHOUR")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetIsNeedUn383Test(false)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetUn383TestFileUrl("https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962&fm=253&app=138&f=JPEG?w=800&h=1333")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetBatteryCountPerPackage("3")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfo.SetBatteryExtraInfo(*fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo()
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo.SetFlammableLiquidsType("PAINT")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo.SetFlammableLiquidsVolume("1")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo.SetVolumeUnit("MILLILITERS")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfo.SetFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo(*fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfo.SetDgClass("ClASS_2")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfo.SetDgUncode("UN3480")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfo.SetMsdsFileUrl("https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962&fm=253&app=138&f=JPEG?w=800&h=1333")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetHazmatInfo(*fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListHazmatInfo)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetIsLotCode(false)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetIsExpirationManagement(false)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfo()
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetShelfLife(90)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetInboundCutoffDays(100)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetExpirationAlertDays(90)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetSalesCutoffDays(80)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetHandlingMethodExpiredGoods("DISPOSE")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetReturnCycle("ONCE_A_WEEK")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo()
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetName("abc")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetPhoneNumber("12221212121")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetPostalCode("92376")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetRegionCode("US")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetState("CA")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetDistrict("San Bernardino")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetCity("Rialto")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetAddressLine1("1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetAddressLine2("1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino")
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetReturnAddressInfo(*fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList.SetShelfLifeAttributeInfo(*fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListShelfLifeAttributeInfo)
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListList := []fbt_v202603.Fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList{*fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoList}
    fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBody.SetCreateGoodsDtoList(fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBodyCreateGoodsDtoListList)
    request = request.Fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBody(*fbt202603CreateGoodsRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}

sample_code.label: Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
scope_list.auth_info: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
